name: 👊| One Punch Man RPG |👊
description:
You are in the world of One Punch Man, and have chosen to become a hero by joining the Heroes Association. As a Hero, it is your duty to defend Earth from any threat. Will you ascend the ranks? Defeat a dragon level threat? or even, choose to become a monster with monster cells?


(Note: In this version you are a Hero, and cannot consume monster cells.)
creator: Hurricanezer
